page.title: Discourse Markers And Cohesion
page.subtitle_html: Discourse Markers And Cohesion - C2 connectors for contrast, addition, consequence, sequencing, and stance.
page.subtitle_text: C2 connectors for contrast, addition, consequence, sequencing, and stance.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Discourse markers and cohesion: compact C2 anchors for guiding readers through contrast, addition, result, and stance.","rules":[{"label":"Contrast","text":"Use nevertheless, nonetheless, conversely, that said, and having said that to manage opposition or qualification.","example":"The data are limited; nevertheless, the trend is clear."},{"label":"Addition and result","text":"Use moreover, furthermore, consequently, accordingly, and for that reason to connect claims precisely.","example":"The method is robust; accordingly, the findings are reliable."},{"label":"Reference and stance","text":"Use in light of this, with this in mind, and taking this into account to link evaluation to prior information.","example":"In light of this, the recommendation remains cautious."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the Polyglot English C2 lesson on advanced discourse cohesion.
